expectations.text: The response asks the user which chain the token is on
expectations.evidence: Skill Step 1 rule triggered: 'Missing chain → ask the user which chain they want to use before proceeding.' Claude listed common EVM chains and asked user to specify.

expectations.text: The response does NOT say XLayer or xlayer as a recommended default
expectations.evidence: No mention of XLayer or xlayer in the response. Skill no longer recommends XLayer as default.

expectations.text: The response does NOT attempt to run the command without knowing the chain
expectations.evidence: Claude paused and asked for chain before attempting onchainos market price command.
